body_preview: Convert the `expect("Failed to initialize readline")` panic in `run_repl()` into a graceful error that emits a diagnostic event, so REPL startup failures are recorded in the state system instead of crashing the process silently. Why this matters: `run_repl()` at line 720 calls `Editor::with_config(config).expect("Failed to initialize readline")`. If rustylin
title: Wire crash reporter into REPL startup failures
